title: Oita, Oita — Guía de Costo de Vida, Vivienda y Reubicación [2026]
description: Guía completa de Oita, Oita: costo de vida, precios de vivienda, vecindarios, disponibilidad de trabajo remoto y consejos de reubicación.
content:
Overview

Oita is a city in Oita with a population of 475,000. Known as the hot spring capital of Japan, with the highest concentration of onsen in the country and a relaxed lifestyle.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
